abando_audit_invite.subject: Recover abandoned checkout revenue

abando_followup.subject: Quick follow-up on checkout recovery

shopifixer_audit_invite.subject: Quick ShopiFixer audit for {{domain}}
shopifixer_audit_invite.body:
Hi — I noticed {{domain}} may be leaving checkout revenue on the table.

I built ShopiFixer through Stafford Media Consulting to surface checkout leaks and point merchants toward the fastest recovery opportunities.

Here is the audit link:
{{audit_link}}

If helpful, I can send over the quick findings.
